# Semantic plausibility fixture for the `cmd/semcheck` harness.
#
# Format (one query per non-comment line):
#     query    plausible1,plausible2,plausible3,...
#
# Harness logic: for each query, call /nearest?word=<query>&k=1 against a
# loaded GloVe store and check whether the returned top-1 label is in the
# comma-separated expected set. GloVe is uncased so all entries are lowercase.
#
# The expected sets are deliberately broad — GloVe's neighbourhoods are
# semantically plausible but not always the "most expected" specific word.

# Royalty & power
king		queen,prince,emperor,monarch,kingdom,ruler,reign
queen		king,princess,elizabeth,throne,regina,monarch
prince		king,princess,duke,royal,charles
princess		queen,prince,royal,diana,duchess
emperor		king,emperors,empire,roman,dynasty
monarch		king,queen,ruler,sovereign,reign

# Family
mother		father,daughter,mom,parent,wife,sister
father		mother,son,dad,parent,husband,brother
son		daughter,father,mother,child,nephew
daughter		son,mother,father,child,niece
brother		sister,brothers,cousin,son,nephew
sister		brother,sisters,mother,aunt,niece

# Animals
dog		cat,dogs,puppy,pet,canine,pig
cat		dog,cats,kitten,pet,feline,rabbit
horse		horses,cattle,pony,mare,stallion,cow
cow		cattle,cows,bull,pig,sheep
elephant		elephants,giraffe,rhinoceros,lion,zoo
lion		lions,tiger,leopard,jaguar,cheetah,elephant,beast,bear
tiger		lion,tigers,bengal,cat,leopard
bird		birds,species,hawk,eagle,sparrow
fish		fishes,fishing,salmon,shark,ocean
snake		snakes,python,cobra,serpent,reptile
wolf		wolves,wolf,wild,coyote,fox

# Colors
red		blue,green,yellow,black,white,orange
blue		red,green,yellow,black,white,orange
green		blue,red,yellow,white,black,orange
yellow		red,green,blue,white,orange,black
black		white,red,dark,blue,color
white		black,red,blue,dark,color

# Body
head		body,face,hand,neck,heads
hand		hands,arm,finger,feet,foot
eye		eyes,face,head,ear,nose
foot		feet,leg,hand,hands,ankle
heart		hearts,cardiac,lungs,soul,minds,blood,brain,pain

# Countries & cities
france		french,spain,germany,paris,italy,europe
germany		german,france,austria,europe,berlin
japan		japanese,korea,china,asia,tokyo
china		chinese,japan,taiwan,asia,beijing
england		english,britain,london,scotland,wales
spain		spanish,portugal,italy,france,mexico
italy		italian,spain,france,rome,europe
russia		russian,soviet,moscow,ukraine,putin
mexico		mexican,spain,argentina,brazil,america
brazil		brazilian,argentina,mexico,peru,chile

paris		france,london,french,cities,berlin,rome
london		paris,england,british,britain,cities
tokyo		japan,japanese,seoul,beijing,osaka
berlin		germany,german,vienna,munich,europe
moscow		russia,russian,kiev,petersburg,soviet
rome		italy,italian,greek,roman,milan

# Verbs & actions
run		running,runs,runner,chase,ran
walk		walking,walks,walked,stroll,run
jump		jumps,jumped,jumping,leap,hop
eat		eating,eats,ate,food,drinking
drink		drinking,drinks,drank,beer,wine
sleep		sleeping,sleeps,slept,bed,awake
swim		swimming,swam,swims,pool,dive
fly		flying,flew,flies,plane,bird

# Feelings
happy		glad,pleased,happier,feel,joyful
sad		unhappy,tragic,sorrow,sadder,feel
angry		anger,mad,frustrated,furious,upset
love		loves,loved,loving,passion,heart
fear		feared,fears,afraid,feared,worry

# Time
day		days,night,week,month,year
night		nights,day,evening,morning,late
morning		evening,afternoon,night,dawn,early
year		years,decade,month,annual,season
week		weeks,month,year,days,weekly

# Transport & technology
car		cars,vehicle,truck,driving,automobile
truck		trucks,car,vehicle,trailer,bus
bike		bicycle,biking,bikes,cycling,motorcycle
plane		planes,aircraft,flight,flying,airplane
computer		computers,software,machine,laptop,electronic
phone		phones,telephone,call,mobile,cell
internet		web,online,net,website,access

# Food
food		foods,eat,meal,eating,cuisine
bread		loaf,bakery,loaves,wheat,cheese,baked,flour,butter,cake
wine		wines,beer,vineyard,champagne,whisky
water		drinking,river,waters,sea,lake
fire		fires,flames,flame,burn,smoke

# Abstract
good		great,well,nice,better,decent
bad		worse,terrible,awful,poor,horrible
big		large,huge,bigger,small,massive
small		smaller,tiny,little,smallest,large
fast		faster,quickly,quick,speed,slow
slow		slower,slowly,slowest,faster,pace

# Science / math
math		mathematics,physics,algebra,calculus,science
science		sciences,scientific,research,physics,chemistry
physics		mathematics,chemistry,biology,science,theoretical
chemistry		biology,physics,chemistries,organic,biochemistry
biology		biological,chemistry,genetics,physiology,ecology

# Miscellaneous
book		books,novel,reading,author,published
music		musical,musician,song,jazz,band
art		arts,artist,painting,artistic,culture
money		cash,dollars,finance,wealth,banking
school		schools,college,education,students,university
doctor		doctors,physician,medical,hospital,nurse
hospital		hospitals,clinic,medical,patients,doctors
war		wars,battle,conflict,soldiers,military
peace		peaceful,war,harmony,tranquility,ceasefire,negotiations,accord,reconciliation,talks
